notes: mild venting but explicitly wants to figure it out themselves; just wants an explanation

messages.content: ugh, CORS again. why does this error even exist

The browser blocks your frontend origin from calling the API origin unless the API says it's allowed. Your API isn't sending an `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header for localhost:5173. I can add the CORS config to the server.
no wait, don't fix it yet. I'll figure it out myself, I want to actually get this. just explain what a preflight request is first
